name: Expurrely Noir
name_jp: エクスピュアリィ・ノアール
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
You can also Xyz Summon this card by using a Rank 2 monster you control with 5 or more materials. (Transfer its materials to this card.) This card is unaffected by your opponent's activated effects while it has 5 or more materials. You can detach 2 materials from this card, then target 1 card your opponent controls or in their GY; place it on the bottom of the Deck. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a Level 1 "Purrely" monster as material.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 7 monsters
You can also Xyz Summon this card by using a Rank 2 monster you control with 5 or more materials. (Transfer its materials to this card.) This card is unaffected by your opponent's activated effects while it has 5 or more materials. You can detach 2 materials from this card, then target 1 card your opponent controls or in their GY; place it on the bottom of the Deck. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a Level 1 "Purrely" monster as material.
eff:
2 Level 7 monsters
You can also Xyz Summon this card by using a Rank 2 monster you control with 5 or more materials. (Transfer its materials to this card.) This card is unaffected by your opponent's activated effects while it has 5 or more materials. You can detach 2 materials from this card, then target 1 card your opponent controls or in their GY; place it on the bottom of the Deck. This is a Quick Effect if this card has a Level 1 "Purrely" monster as material.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Places cards from the opponent's field on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
